series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by wholesale cigarette dealers to summarize their complete cigarette activity for a semi-annual period (or partial semi-annual period) of time.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after the end of the calendar year in which the return was filed. ; Paper: 3 years after the end of the calendar year in which the return was filed. If scanned, retain for 6 months., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
